rationale.oversight-explanation: AI summarizes code and rationale to support human reviewers' understanding.
rationale.ai-review: Agents identify defects, suggest improvements, and propose code review comments.
rationale.counterpoint: Argues against full automation, advocating human-in-the-loop AI support instead.
rationale.intro-framing: Presents a vision and research agenda for AI-supported code review.
rationale.framework: Proposes an agent-based reference architecture for a code review platform.
rationale.general-code: Focuses on AI assisting review of general software code.
